query:
SELECT id, leadName, leadPhone, stage, leadSource, aiMode, 
       lastAiMessageAt, autoFollowUpSent, createdAt, updatedAt,
       SUBSTRING(messageHistory, 1, 200) as msgPreview
FROM conversationSessions
WHERE leadSource = 'widget' OR stage = 'WIDGET_SIZING'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
